problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor may resolve How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
